commit.message:
Task 38: test: add time formatting module tests (#38)

* Task 38: test: add time formatting module tests

Tests for formatUptime, formatDeployAge, and startUptimeTicker covering:
seconds/minutes/hours/days formatting, deploy age, null/undefined/invalid
inputs, ISO 8601 timezone offset parsing, ticker updates, ticker cleanup,
and ticker self-clean on DOM removal.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: address PR review feedback for time formatting module

- Remove unreachable negative guard from _formatElapsed (callers
  already filter negatives via _parseElapsedMs)
- Set initial textContent immediately in startUptimeTicker instead
  of waiting 60s for the first interval tick
- Fix weak timer-clear test with sentinel pattern to prove clearing
  actually prevents updates
- DRY: extract shared beforeEach/afterEach timer setup to outer
  describe, extract FAKE_NOW constant, shared DOM element setup

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: add missing jsdom environment directive to time.test.js

The startUptimeTicker tests use document.createElement which requires
jsdom. Without the @vitest-environment directive, the root vitest
config runs these tests without jsdom, causing "document is not
defined" errors.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix OAuth callback: handle via client-side fetch to bypass SPA fallback

Volvo redirects browser to /api/volvo/callback which is a navigation
request intercepted by Cloudflare SPA fallback. Now the React app
detects the callback URL, extracts params, and POSTs them to the
worker via fetch. Shows "Connecting Volvo..." during the exchange.

commit.message:
Fix dimension→aspect ratio mapping for all creative sizes

- Add 1280x720 (16:9), 864x1080 (4:5), 1000x1500 (3:4), 1600x900 (16:9),
  1200x627 (16:9), 1080x608 (16:9), 970x600 (16:9), 1584x396 (4:1),
  1440x400 (4:1), 970x250 (4:1), 600x200 (4:1), 320x50 (4:1) to the map
- Unmapped dimensions were silently falling back to 1:1 (square)
- Strengthen buildDimensionInstruction text so Gemini actually respects ratio

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: 深度降噪 + 双端分析 + 事件时间轴 + 地区合并

fetcher.py — 降噪与信号加固:
- EXCLUSION_PATTERNS 新增：Pocket Gamer Connects、ThinkingData、GDC、PAX、
  Gamescom、E3、游戏行业峰会/expo、投资者日、财报电话
- GAME_SIGNALS 新增：PC Launcher 隐私/数据收集、跨平台进度同步数据合规

utils.py — 地区合并:
- 东南亚并入"亚太"大类（越南/新加坡/泰国/菲律宾等均归为亚太）
- _GROUP_ORDER 从 8 组精简为 7 组（移除东南亚）

monitor.py — 事件级时间轴聚类:
- _deduplicate_items 两阶段重构：
  阶段1（2天窗口，sim>0.8）当日去重（原有逻辑）
  阶段2（2-14天窗口，sim 0.5-0.8）事件聚类：同region同category
  → LLM verify_duplicate_pairs 确认 → 合并并追加时间轴
- _make_timeline_note：生成"进展：YYYY-MM-DD [状态] → [状态]"格式

translator.py — 双端分析摘要:
- summary_zh 三段改为：【核心整改点】/【多端业务影响】/【行动建议】
- 明确区分 PC 端（Steam/D2C/Anti-cheat）vs 移动端（App Store/IAP）合规路径
- 行动建议要求给出优先级和操作时限

reporter.py — 布局与清洗:
- 东南亚分组合并入亚太（_TEXT_GROUP_PATTERNS + JS groupOrder）
- summary 列宽 55% → 65%
- _clean_title：解码 HTML 实体 + 剥离媒体机构后缀（Reuters/GamesIndustry等）
- 所有 HTML 生成中调用 _clean_title 清洗原标题

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: use relative API URL fallback for k3d/nginx proxy (T017)

VITE_API_URL fallback was http://localhost:8000, causing
ERR_CONNECTION_REFUSED in k3d. Empty string fallback uses relative
paths so nginx proxies /api/ to the backend service.

commit.message:
fix: micro-cap stop-loss bypass now uses correct threshold

The stop-loss bypass trade builder in reason.js and the auto-scan in
enforceMandate() both used the uniform stopLossPct (15%) instead of the
tighter microCapStopLossPct (10%) for tokens under microCapThresholdUsd.
A micro-cap at -11% would trigger the bypass (Claude skipped) but produce
an empty trade list — Claude frozen, position bleeding indefinitely.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

The OnePageNavigation handler in main.js was calling preventDefault()
on ALL mobile menu link clicks, including links to other pages like
about.html and contact.html. Now it only intercepts anchor links
(#hash) and lets normal page links work as expected.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix push: store chunks/entry in local SQLite and encode '+' in doc IDs

- Store newly created leaf chunks and entry docs in local SQLite
  immediately after pushing to CouchDB, so materialize can find them
  without waiting for the pull echo via _changes feed.
- Add escapeDocID() that encodes '+' as '%2B' in URL paths, fixing
  HEAD lookups failing through reverse proxies that decode '+' as space.
- Downgrade leaf conflict log from WARN to DEBUG (expected behavior
  for content-addressed chunks that already exist).

commit.message:
fix: complete Weaviate filter chain fix, harden classification parsing, fix mood path

Three bug fixes from agent/bugs/bug-weaviate-filter-chain-and-classification-parse.md:

1. Replace all chained .and() calls with Filters.and() across 11 call sites
   in 7 files. The chained syntax does not exist in Weaviate client v3 and
   was silently breaking Phase 0 emotional scoring for every collection.
   Files: rem-phase0.scoring.ts, rem.service.ts, rem.pruning.ts,
   rem.reconciliation.ts, scoring-context.service.ts, rem-cycle-trigger.ts

2. Harden parseClassificationResponse() to extract first JSON object from
   mixed text when direct JSON.parse() fails. Log raw response on failure.
   Reduces ~20% classification skip rate from Haiku responses.

3. Fix Firestore mood path from {BASE}.users/{uid}/{ghost}/core (collection)
   / mood (doc) to {BASE}.users/{uid}/{ghost} (collection) / core (doc).
   Single core document per ghost, matching design spec.

Tests: 94 suites, 1558 tests passing

Version: 0.45.5

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
